task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base main window shows 'TrackEditor' in the Forms section, or an active form design window is titled 'TrackEditor'.

task_completion.description: The form includes all fields from the Track table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form design or data entry view displays input controls for all 9 columns: TrackId, Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, and UnitPrice.

task_completion.description: The 'TrackId' field is configured as read-only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Properties dialog for the TrackId text box control shows the 'Read-only' property set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: The 'UnitPrice' field is formatted as currency (USD) with 2 decimal places.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Properties dialog or Number Format dialog for the UnitPrice control shows the Category set to 'Currency', the format code or symbol indicating USD ($), and 'Decimal places' set to 2.

task_completion.description: The 'Composer' field has a maximum text length of 100 characters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Properties dialog for the Composer text box control shows the 'Max. text length' property explicitly set to 100.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to create and modify the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Base interface, Form Design view, and Control Properties dialogs being actively used, rather than terminal commands or direct XML editing of the .odb file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual chinook.odb database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base window title or status bar indicates 'chinook.odb' is open, and the table/field names match the Chinook schema.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by writing a script or text file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) being used to artificially generate success messages or manipulate the database files outside of LibreOffice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database is located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The 'Track' table contains exactly 9 columns: TrackId, Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, and UnitPrice. The form must include all 9 of these fields. The Composer field defaults to 220 characters in the schema but must be restricted to 100 in the form properties. UnitPrice defaults to NUMERIC(10,2) but needs explicit currency formatting applied in the form controls.
